get.description:
SSE stream that pushes unread count every 5 seconds.

Uses fresh DB sessions per poll to avoid holding a stale request-scoped
session open for the lifetime of the SSE connection.
Return whether MFA is currently enabled for the authenticated user.

post.description:
Generate a new TOTP secret for the authenticated user.
The secret is NOT saved yet — call /mfa/confirm with a valid code to activate.
Returns the provisioning URI and an optional inline QR code PNG (data: URI).

Confirm MFA setup by verifying the first code from the authenticator app.
On success, sets mfa_enabled=True.

Disable MFA for the authenticated user after verifying current TOTP code.
Requires a valid code to prevent accidental/malicious disabling.

AutomationLevel.title: AutomationLevel

challenge.title: Challenge
challenge.default: Increase execution quality with strict data-driven coaching.

daily_focus.title: Daily Focus
daily_focus.description: What should be pushed into daily context as priorities

domain_notes.title: Domain Notes
domain_notes.description: Long-form domain or business notes for later retrieval

challenge.title: Challenge
challenge.default: Identify clone limitations and propose a practical self-improvement plan.

date.title: Date
date.description: The date this context belongs to

related_to.title: Related To
related_to.description: Name or entity this relates to

split_lines.title: Split Lines
split_lines.description: If true, each non-empty line becomes a separate item

consent_confirmed.title: Consent Confirmed
consent_confirmed.description: Must be true. Only process conversations where consent/legal basis exists.

expires_at.title: Expires At
expires_at.description: Auto-expire this memory entry after this time

reports_to_id.title: Reports To Id

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: Link to auth user if they have login access
